target_area.description: Results Section 4.3 Table 5 covered-bin static-evidence transition and adjacent Figure 3 flow

change_summary: Replaced 'Four covered bins carry selected three-condition static evidence' with 'The audit provides static evidence only for the four covered bins'.
Removed the rendered page-5 split where 'three-' ended one line and 'condition static evidence' opened the next.
Preserved the material-effect claim boundary while making the Table 5 transition more direct.

observations: Before: page 5 rendered 'Four covered bins carry selected three-' followed by 'condition static evidence.'
After: page 5 renders 'The audit provides static evidence only for the four covered bins.' without the old three-condition split.
Page 5 column endings remain stable after the localized sentence rewrite.
Page 6 Figure 3 and its caption remain visually stable.
